activeAlerts.alert: CLOSED from 18 May 2025 for renovation. Crittenden Estate reclaiming and relaunching under a new name (TBD). Reopening planned late Oct/Nov 2025. Do NOT list as open under 'Stillwater at Crittenden'.

hatsGFG2025.note: Good Food Guide 2025 Melbourne. Update annually on GFG release.

twoHat.name: Barragunda Dining
twoHat.note: Debut Feb 2025; GFG Trailblazer Award; degustation $145pp; 40-seat converted farmhouse on 1000-acre estate

twoHat.name: Laura
twoHat.chef: Josep Espuga (Culinary Director; succeeded Phil Wood)
twoHat.note: Relais & Châteaux member; 2 hats for 7+ years; within Pt. Leo Estate sculpture park

twoHat.name: Tedesca Osteria
twoHat.note: Regional Restaurant of the Year 2025; agriturismo concept; biodynamic farm; 30-seat restaurant

twoHat.name: Ten Minutes by Tractor
twoHat.chef: Craig Lunn (appointed late 2025; ex-Michelin kitchens UK/Europe)
twoHat.note: Essence Menu $145pp; Signature Menu $290pp; first certified organic vineyard on Peninsula

venues.name: Laura
venues.hours: Lunch Thu–Mon from 12pm; Dinner Sat from 6pm (Fri in peak season)
venues.mustOrder: 8-course chef's journey; 4-course signature; Southern Rock lobster with white asparagus; wagyu with yuzu apple
venues.notes: Relais & Châteaux member. Within Pt. Leo Estate sculpture park.

venues.name: Doot Doot Doot
venues.views: Willow Creek vineyard views; moody interior
venues.mustOrder: A5 Wagyu MB12; Skull Island tiger prawn; appellation oysters; spanner crab omelette
venues.notes: 80 seats. Iconic 10,000-globe chandelier. Part of Jackalope Hotel — open to non-guests.

venues.name: Rare Hare
venues.mustOrder: Classic Hare Share $85pp (feast); charred broccoli with cheese custard
venues.notes: 90 seats. Walk-ins only. Wood-fired oven.

venues.name: Ten Minutes by Tractor
venues.chef: Craig Lunn (Head Chef — ex-Michelin kitchens UK/Europe)
venues.hours: Wed–Sun lunch from 12pm; Fri–Sat dinner from 6pm; Mon–Tue closed
venues.mustOrder: Essence Menu $145pp; Signature Menu $290pp
venues.notes: First certified organic vineyard on Peninsula. Craig Lunn appointed late 2025. Allis wine bar also on-site (Fri–Sat 11am–9pm; Sun 11am–6pm).

venues.name: Tedesca Osteria
venues.mustOrder: 5-course set menu (hand-rolled pasta + seafood + meat + dessert)
venues.notes: Converted 1940s house. Wood-fired oven + open grill. Chickens, beehives, Wiltshire Horn sheep on property. Also offers Graceburn House accommodation.

venues.name: Barragunda Dining
venues.chef: Simone Watts (Executive Chef — ex-Coda, Pearl Melbourne)
venues.mustOrder: $145 degustation; hibachi-charred silverside with preserved fennel; estate organic vegetables
venues.notes: Opened Feb 2025. 40-seat converted farmhouse. 1000-acre Barragunda Estate. No.3 Urban List's Best Melbourne Restaurants 2026.

venues.name: Montalto
venues.bookingNote: Restaurant requires booking; Piazza walk-in daily
venues.views: Sweeping vineyard + sculpture trail + Western Port on horizon
venues.hours: Cellar door open daily 11am–5pm; Restaurant Fri–Mon for lunch; Piazza daily 11am–5pm (kitchen to 4pm)
venues.mustOrder: 3-4 course set menu from $130pp; Chef's Table $195pp (groups 6–12)
venues.notes: 1km sculpture trail. Kitchen garden supplies restaurant. Piazza is the casual walk-in tier.

venues.name: Polperro Restaurant
venues.mustOrder: Chef's Tasting Menu; tea-smoked Aylesbury duck breast
venues.notes: Sister venue: Many Little Bar & Bistro (same ownership). Functions and weddings.

venues.name: Port Phillip Estate
venues.address: 263 Red Hill Road, Red Hill South
venues.views: Spectacular vineyard + Port Phillip Bay panorama
venues.hours: Lunch daily; Fri–Sat dinner — check website
venues.mustOrder: Caught-that-day Flinders mussels; farm-fresh lamb; house chocolate tart
venues.notes: Striking rammed-earth building. 6 accommodation suites on-site.

venues.name: Paringa Estate
venues.bookingNote: Bookings essential for restaurant; Garden Dining walk-in Wed–Sun 12–3pm
venues.hours: Lunch Wed–Sun from 12pm; Dinner Saturday from 6:30pm; Closed Mon–Tue
venues.mustOrder: Autumn Four: 4-course $139; Garden Dining shared plates
venues.notes: AGFG 2026 hat only (not in GFG 2025 top 11). Winemaker: Lindsay McCall (founded 1985).

venues.name: Many Little Bar & Dining
venues.notes: Sister venue to Polperro (same ownership). Red Hill village.

venues.name: Moke Dining
venues.notes: Family-owned.

venues.name: Lancemore Lindenderry Dining Room
venues.mustOrder: Torched Abrolhos scallop with XO sauce; roast quail smoked tableside; Sher Wagyu rostbiff
venues.notes: AGFG 2025+2026 (Readers' Choice). Not in GFG Age 2025 top 11. Readers' Choice Award 2023–2026.

venues.name: The Baths Sorrento
venues.hours: Daily in peak season; Mon–Tue closed otherwise; Fri–Sun lunch + dinner
venues.mustOrder: Fish & chips (lemon caper sauce); natural oysters; seafood linguine
venues.notes: 2-course $75 / 3-course $89. Menu changes daily. Open 7 days in January.

venues.name: Portsea Hotel
venues.bookingNote: Walk-in only 23 Dec–31 Jan; bookings rest of year
venues.notes: Ishka Restaurant for more formal dining. Walk-in only peak season.

venues.name: Shi Hui Shi (Hotel Sorrento)
venues.chef: Junlin Yi (Head Chef — ex-Red Spice Road)
venues.mustOrder: Chicken & truffle dumplings; green beans with house-made XO sauce; roast duck with hoisin pancakes
venues.notes: Formerly The Continental / Audrey's (Scott Pickett). Now Cantonese. In limestone basement of Hotel Sorrento (5–15 Hotham Rd). SEPARATE property from InterContinental Sorrento.

venues.name: The Rocks Mornington
venues.views: Port Phillip Bay + marina harbour + Melbourne skyline
venues.hours: Wed–Mon lunch & dinner; Tuesday lunch only
venues.mustOrder: Classic fish & chips; Mornington mussels; lobster roll; butterflied mooloolaba prawns
venues.notes: A Taste of the Rocks $85pp / Seafood Experience $119pp. Weekly changing menu.

venues.name: Commonfolk Coffee
venues.hours: Weekdays 6:30am–5pm; Weekends 8am–5pm; every day except Christmas
venues.mustOrder: 18-hr slow-cooked pork Cubano; strawberry french toast; iced chai; breakfast burrito
venues.notes: House roaster. Second location in Frankston. Onsite garden + small farm for produce.

venues.name: Miller's Bread Kitchen
venues.address: 116 Nepean Highway, Dromana (+ Miller's Bread Cantina, 115 Main Street, Mornington)
venues.mustOrder: Cinnamon berry scrolls; chocolate eclairs; lamb massaman pies; potato & rosemary focaccia; sourdough (Tuerong Farm flour)
venues.notes: Family-run. Opened 2019 in converted mechanic's garage. Two locations. Also supplies Store 360 Rye.

venues.name: Nordie Cafe
venues.hours: Morning hours; check website or call
venues.mustOrder: Rösti benedict; smoked salmon smørrebrød; Danish hotdog; apple turnover
venues.notes: Adjoining mini-mart with local produce and HAY furniture. Cubby house for kids.

venues.name: Green Olive at Red Hill
venues.hours: 9am–5pm (food); open daily in peak; closed Christmas and restricted private events low season
venues.notes: Farm School cooking classes available. Main Ridge Dairy / local olives.

venues.name: Merricks General Wine Store
venues.mustOrder: Mushroom fazzoletti; crusted hazeldene chicken; daily specials
venues.notes: Original timber grocery store. Elgee Park cellar door adjacent. Most photographed building on Peninsula.

venues.name: Flinders Hotel
venues.notes: Central Flinders village. Family-friendly. Lunch + dinner daily.

venues.name: Georgie Bass Cafe & Cookery
venues.hours: Open daily (morning + lunch hours — check website)
venues.notes: Cookery school on-site.

venues.name: Foxeys Hangout
venues.notes: First Peninsula winery with full organic and biodynamic certification. Max group size 6. Kitchen last order 4pm.

venues.name: Bistro Elba
venues.mustOrder: Huîtres; Tourte au poulet (chicken/tarragon/leek pot pie); Moules Rockefeller
venues.notes: Uses Harry Harris Flinders mussels. 2-course $65pp. Small intimate bistro.

venues.name: The Milbri
venues.hours: Open daily for lunch + dinner; Taco Tuesday nights
venues.mustOrder: Burrito (crispy chicken/wagyu/pork belly); churros; $5 tacos on Tuesdays
venues.notes: Taco Tuesday: $5 tacos + $10 margaritas. Tasting Menu $79pp. Beachfront Rosebud.

doNotInclude.name: Stable Coffee Kitchen (Rye)
doNotInclude.reason: Cannot be confirmed. 'Stable Coffee Kitchen' leads to a QLD venue (Cornerstone Stores Currumbin). No Mornington Peninsula venue by this name verified.

doNotInclude.name: The Baker's Wife (Rye)
doNotInclude.reason: Cannot be verified from any 2025+ source. Possibly closed, relocated, or trading under a different name. Needs on-the-ground verification.
